pr.title: mp: Match mpLib_80053ECC_Floor and update mpisland.h signatures
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2040 attempted to improve matching for `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor` in `src/melee/mp/mplib.c` by replacing a structured `while (true)` loop with a goto-labeled loop shape and adding locals `shifted` and `new_id`. The PR body also claimed `mpisland.h` signature updates and a 100% decomp.me match, but the loaded changed-file metadata and diff only show `src/melee/mp/mplib.c`, while the bot report shows improvement from 89.53% to 94.89%. The author later said recent merged changes affected the match percentage and they would switch the PR to draft. The PR was closed with no merge timestamp.

key_files.role: Only changed file in loaded metadata; contains attempted `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor` loop-shape rewrite.

what_changed.text: `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor` changed from a `while (true)` loop with `break` to explicit labels `loop_entry` and `loop_start` plus gotos.
Locals `shifted` and `new_id` were added at function scope; the diff assigns `shifted = line_id << 3` before reading `groundCollLine[line_id].x0->prev_id0`.
The loop still follows `prev_id0` while the previous line exists and has `CollLine_Floor` set, then continues to `LINEID_CHECK(4453, line_id)`.
PR body claimed updates to `mpisland.h` signatures from `UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS` to proper types, but no `mpisland.h` file change appears in the loaded changed-file metadata or diff.
Bot report recorded one unmatched-function improvement for `main/melee/mp/mplib` / `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor`, from 89.53% to 94.89%, not a completed 100% match.

smart_moves.text: The author noted that recently merged changes affected the match percentage and planned to rework the PR rather than present the stale score as final.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For matching PR intake, treat PR-body decomp.me score claims as provisional when bot reports or later author comments disagree; keep the conflicting evidence visible instead of recording the function as matched.
A goto-based loop rewrite may improve MWCC codegen for a specific collision traversal, but this PR does not provide enough successful verification to make it a general style recommendation.
When a PR title/body claims header prototype cleanup, confirm the changed-file list includes the owning header before recording header work as performed.

naming_conventions.text: No durable naming convention was established. Added names `shifted` and `new_id` are local matching-shape variables in the diff, not evidence of a broader naming rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit labels and gotos to mimic a loop-entry / loop-start shape when MWCC codegen does not match a structured `while (true)` form.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Loaded verification is mixed: PR body claims 100% decomp.me, but bot report shows only 94.89% and the author later said the PR needed rework.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Hoist `new_id` out of the loop block to function scope so the `loop_start` label can assign `line_id = new_id` before re-entering the traversal check.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: This is a narrow observation from the diff, not a proven general tactic.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduce an apparently codegen-relevant temporary `shifted = line_id << 3` before reading `groundCollLine[line_id]`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The loaded slice does not show later use of `shifted` or prove why it was required.

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were loaded.
Automated bot feedback reported partial score improvement for `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor`, from 89.53% to 94.89%.
Author follow-up said the PR likely needed rework because recently merged changes affected its match percentage.

follow_up_queries: PR 2040 mpLib_80053ECC_Floor later replacement or rework
mpisland.h UNK_RET UNK_PARAMS signatures mp PR

notes: Changed-file evidence is strong for `src/melee/mp/mplib.c` and the loop rewrite.
The title/body claim `mpisland.h` signature updates, but loaded changed-file metadata and diff contain only `src/melee/mp/mplib.c`; header update is not evidenced in this slice.

Verification evidence conflicts: PR body says build passed and `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor` matched 100% on decomp.me, while bot report shows only 94.89% and author later says the match percentage was affected and the PR needed rework.
No review comments or reviews were loaded.
PR is closed with `merged_at: null`; do not treat changes as accepted into mainline.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Conflicting PR-body and bot score evidence should block recording a match as accepted
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2040, the body claimed `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor` matched 100% on decomp.me, but the bot reported 89.53% to 94.89% and the author later said the PR needed rework. Curator may record this as a cautionary example for matching-score intake, not as a matched-function success.

source_update_candidates.title: Treat goto loop rewrites as narrow matching tactics requiring verifier evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2040 shows an attempted `while` to goto-label loop rewrite for MWCC codegen in `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor`, but loaded evidence is not enough to endorse the shape broadly: bot score remained 94.89% and the author later planned rework. Consider adding or cross-linking this example under existing control-flow and matching-tactics standards as a case where gotos need narrow objdiff/checkdiff evidence and should not override natural loops without proof.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR provides a concrete attempted goto-for-codegen tactic, but conflicting verification means it should be curated as a caution or evidence requirement, not as accepted style.

source_update_candidates.title: Do not record claimed header cleanup unless changed-file evidence includes the header
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2040's title/body claimed `mpisland.h` signature updates from `UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS`, but the loaded diff and changed-file list only show `src/melee/mp/mplib.c`. Consider adding a curator note that PR-body header/prototype claims require changed-file or diff evidence before being promoted as source facts.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a recurring intake hazard: title/body claims can exceed the actual loaded diff.

rejection_notes: Do not record `mpLib_80053ECC_Floor` as matched or accepted from this slice; the bot report and later author comment contradict the 100% match claim.
Do not record `mpisland.h` signatures as updated from this slice; no loaded changed-file or diff evidence shows the header.
Do not infer reviewer intent; no review comments were loaded.
Do not promote goto-based loop structure as a general preferred style; standards favor natural loops unless verifier evidence justifies an exception.
